name: Golf Academy of New England
about: The Golf Academy of New England is a premier training facility specializing in year-round junior and adult golf instruction. Located in southeastern Massachusetts, the academy offers a range of programs including prep teams, PGA Jr League, private lessons, and group sessions. The facility utilizes advanced TrackMan IO technology for indoor training and provides access to the Links & Drinks location for practice and simulator rentals. The academy emphasizes swing knowledge, proper technique, and effective practice habits for golfers of all ages.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan IO technology for precise swing analysis
On-site simulator bays at Links & Drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Bar food available at Links & Drinks location
Beer available at Links & Drinks location

simulator_hardware.notes: The most accurate in the industry, endorsed by the PGA Tour

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and simulator sessions. The academy specializes in instruction using personal equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The Links & Drinks location offers bar food and beer on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact time for 18 holes, but standard sessions are typically 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Golf Academy specializes in junior training with programs for ages 8-18, including prep classes and PGA Jr League options.
